resources.string: Set background image for character chat page
Extract Material You colors from background or avatar
Choose a color palette extracted from your images
Darken in dark mode, lighten in light mode
Set default chat model for character. If not set, global default will be used.
Controls how many history messages are sent as context. Messages beyond this limit are ignored to save tokens.
Are you sure you want to delete this character? This cannot be undone.
Use QuickJS engine to execute JavaScript code for calculations and scripting
Execute Python code with pip packages and file I/O. Supports numpy and Pillow.
Bind a local Linux workspace with shell, files, Python, and pip tools.
Let the assistant read text aloud using your selected TTS provider
Let the character ask clarifying questions.
Allow this character to generate images with the selected image model and save them to the gallery.
Allow Python code to make network requests
Max generation tokens. Leave empty for no limit.
When enabled, the model will try to remember information from your conversation for future use. Requires tool support.
Controls message format sent to LLM. Usually doesn\'t need modification.
When enabled, character will reference recent chat history for better context
Lets the character deliberately recall core memories, episodes, and older chats
Define regex patterns to transform messages before sending/receiving
Visual Only (Only affects display, not actual message)
Don\'t modify this unless you know what you are doing
Use character avatar and name in chat instead of model\'s
Import provider settings from a Cherry Studio backup
App needs restart to apply settings.
This memory will be removed from the assistant.
Allow this workspace tool without asking again.
Type an instruction in the message bar.
No, what should I do instead?
Please chat first before editing title
Apply these switches to every export format.
Add full reasoning text under each assistant turn.
Add readable tool and activity details.
Include stored diagnostics, error codes, and redacted raw details.
No stored API error details for this selection.
Searches conversation titles and message text
For Global Users, get Discord Role
Generated by AI, may contain inaccuracies.
Select aspect ratio for generated image
Are you sure you want to cancel generation?
Select AI model for image generation
Describe the image you want to generate...
No AI providers available, please add in settings
Camera permission required to take photos
Microphone permission is required for speech-to-text recording
Some permissions permanently denied, please enable in settings:
Use pure black background in dark mode
Automatically collapse thinking content when done
Expand the activity pill to show live reasoning while generating
Show model icon in chat list
Automatically collapse code blocks by default
Wrap long lines in code blocks
Create a new conversation when app starts
Show more debug features. Not recommended for normal users.
Enable haptic feedback during message generation
Give floating pills and chat controls a soft glass blur
Show notification when message generation completes in background
Show quick jump button when scrolling chat
Show model name in chat messages
Show token statistics below AI responses
Show user avatar in chat messages
Show chat bubbles around character messages
Add custom HTTP headers for MCP server requests
Paste an `mcpServers` JSON config to add servers quickly.
No valid MCP servers were found in this JSON.
Tools list unavailable during creation. Please view after adding.
Model used by Imagine and the opt-in image generation tool.
Model for generating chat suggestions. Recommend fast/cheap model.
Model for memory summarization and context refresh across all characters.
Model for helper agents such as deliberate memory recall.
Select a summarizer model in Settings > Default Models
Model for summarizing chat titles. Recommend fast/cheap model.
Select built-in tools for this model. Only supported for Gemini.
You haven\'t configured API and models yet.
View user manual and help docs
Support the author if you like this app
Local AI - Open Source AI Assistant
Click button below to add models
Are you sure you want to delete this provider? This cannot be undone.
This QR part was already scanned
Scanned %1$d of %2$d QR codes. Continue with the remaining codes.
This QR code belongs to another provider transfer
Couldn\'t fetch models from the API. Try adding an API key!
Couldn\'t fetch any models from the API. Maybe this provider doesn\'t support model fetching. You can add models manually though!
Configure custom settings for this model. Common settings still come from the parent provider.
Response API is unsupported by most providers. Leave this off unless your provider supports it.
Start ComfyUI, enter its server URL, then import an API workflow JSON. Local AI will auto-detect common prompt and checkpoint nodes.
Workflow needed. In ComfyUI, export the workflow in API format and import it here.
Workflow ready. Add or rename the model below to match your checkpoint file.
Only change these if auto-detect picks the wrong workflow nodes.
It looks like you don\'t have this provider in your list. Don\'t worry, we have a preset ready for you!
Installed Android speech engine used for this local provider
Use Local AI on your network
Start a local web server to browse conversations and send messages from devices on the same network.
Server is live on your LAN
Choose the port your browser will connect to.
Require a password when accessing the web UI
Allow notifications and battery changes so web access stays available with the screen off.
Notifications were not allowed. Server status may be hidden.
Battery optimization may stop web access when the screen turns off.
Start the server to get a reachable address.
Hello, this is a text-to-speech test.
Show a dedicated microphone button in the chat input instead of the model settings icon.\n(If this is off, you can still use STT by long-pressing the + button)
Quick access to chat with a character
* SiliconFlow free models built-in. No API Key needed. For more powerful models, please use your own API Key.
Tools are disabled for current model. Please enable tools in settings to use Search/MCP.
Model for text embeddings (e.g. for memory).
Optional prompt to guide the model\'s style
Your character won\'t remember this chat and you won\'t be able to access it once you close it.
Are you sure you want to delete this memory? This cannot be undone.
Structured instructions that can be toggled per chat
Define custom skills that can be toggled on/off per chat. Higher priority skills are injected first.
Add skills to inject custom instructions
Create organized collections of prompts that activate based on keywords or semantic similarity.
Add lorebooks to inject context-aware prompts
Tap to select an image or emoji
Add entries to inject prompts when triggered
Import or create skills that follow the Claude Skills standard. Skills provide structured instructions with metadata that guide AI behaviour.
Add skills to extend AI capabilities with structured instructions
What the skill does and when to use it…
Turn this off to choose exactly which characters can use this skill
Choose which characters can autonomously enable or disable this skill
Enabled by default for every character this skill is available for. You can still turn it off in a chat.
Prevent the AI from activating this skill automatically
Allow user to invoke this skill directly
Select which lorebooks to use with this character
Create lorebooks in Settings → Add-ons → Lorebooks
Select which skills to use with this character
Create skills in Settings > Add-ons > Skills
Lorebooks, time awareness, message history, search results
Select which lorebooks to use with this assistant
Select which skills to use with this assistant
Tell the AI the current local time and notable conversation gaps so it can track pacing more naturally
Limit messages sent to model (0 = unlimited)
Generate summaries of pruned messages to preserve context
Compress conversation into a summary to free up context space
Show summarize button in chat input
Configure a summarizer model in Settings > Default Models first
Optional: choose a dedicated summarizer model in Settings > Default Models for better summaries.
Choose a dedicated summarizer model in Settings > Default Models for better summaries.
This will summarize your conversation history into a compact form. The AI will remember the key points but detailed messages will be replaced with a summary.
Ask a question about this text…
Select text anywhere on your device, look for \"Local AI\" in the toolbar that appears, and tap it to use these features.

This is sample text you can select! Try long-pressing to select these words, then look for \"Local AI\" in the selection toolbar. If you don\'t see it, you may need to tap the overflow menu (⋮) to find it.
👆 Long-press the text above to try selecting it
Style shown at top of empty chat
Your restored backup includes notification features that need additional access:
Grant or enable them so notifications and scheduled follow-ups work properly.
Checking this exact model with the provider API
This model was not returned by the provider API
The provider API did not expose capability metadata for this model
Capabilities already match the provider API
Model capabilities updated from the provider API
The base URL usually ends with `/v1beta`
Failed to update Local AI Catalog: %1$s
Your ElevenLabs API key from your account settings
The ID of the voice to use. Find voice IDs in ElevenLabs Voice Library.
The TTS model to use. Multilingual v2 supports 29 languages.
Are you sure you want to restore default actions? This will replace all your custom actions.
No new messages to summarize. The latest exchange will be kept.
[Location unavailable - grant location permission in Settings > Apps > LastChat]
Run open models on this device. ~1.5 GB download required (Qwen2.5 1.5B Q8).
RikkaHub needs to download a starter model for this provider. The download is ~1.5 GB (Qwen2.5 1.5B Q8). Continue?
Off by default. Some devices crash during inference on the GPU/NPU backend with this runtime — leave off if you hit a crash. CPU-only is slower but reliable.

Override the curated default. The model file\'s KV cache is the hard ceiling — Qwen ekv4096 caps at 4096 regardless. Capable models (Gemma 4 E2B = 32000) benefit from a larger value. Leave blank to use the curated default.
Recovered: the local model crashed last session on %1$s — switched to CPU automatically. Tap to dismiss; toggle “Try GPU acceleration” below to retry.
Need about %1$d MB of free RAM (model is %2$d MB plus runtime headroom) but only %3$d MB is available. Close other apps or pick a smaller model.
Or paste a HuggingFace URL (/blob/ or /resolve/ both work)
Tool calling: prompt-engineered. Accuracy varies per model.
%1$d model(s) installed. Manage them in the Models tab.
Vision unavailable on this device — running text-only
Remove \"%1$s\" from your device? This deletes the file (you\'ll need to download it again to use it).
Invalid URL: must be https and well-formed
Curated by Google AI Edge Gallery. Pick one for one-tap install.
Allow this workspace to run a terminal environment using local Rootfs
When enabled, user confirmation is required before AI calls this tool
Will download Ubuntu, verify proot, and install Python + pip for %s.
Manage local working directories accessible by Agent
Set the working directory for the current session
Are you sure you want to delete this workspace? This cannot be undone.
Click + to create your first workspace
Download Gallery-compatible LiteRT packages, tune runtime safety, and manage the models stored on this phone.
Keep LastChat open or use the notification to watch progress.
CPU mode is the reliable baseline. Try acceleration only when a model is stable on this device.
Paste a direct HuggingFace model URL when you already know the package is LiteRT-compatible.
Install the recommended Qwen package first; it is the safest starter model for 8 GB phones.
